name: transcriptor
description: Multi-agent system for automated assembly minutes production

scripts.gloria: npx tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && npx tsc -p packages/chucho/tsconfig.json && npx tsc -p packages/gloria/tsconfig.json && pkill -f 'node.*reviewServer' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && node --env-file=.env.local packages/gloria/dist/reviewServer.js
scripts.gloria:build: npx tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && npx tsc -p packages/chucho/tsconfig.json && npx tsc -p packages/supervisor/tsconfig.json && npx tsc -p packages/robinson/tsconfig.json && npx tsc -p packages/gloria/tsconfig.json
